zh.lifeSummary: 當William de Morley 3rd Baron Morley於1319年6月24日出生在英國諾福爾可霍可林時，他的父親Robert DeMorley26歲，母親Hawise Marshall19歲。他於1344年3月6日與Cecily Bardolf在英國諾福爾可喬加結婚。他們至少是5個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世於1379年4月30日在英國艾可享年59歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭諾福爾可諾維其。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当William de Morley 3rd Baron Morley于1319年6月24日出生在英国諾福爾可霍可林时，他的父亲Robert DeMorley26岁，母亲Hawise Marshall19岁。他于1344年3月6日与Cecily Bardolf在英国諾福爾可喬加结婚。他们至少是5个儿子和1个女儿的父母。他去世于1379年4月30日在英国艾可享年59岁，埋葬在英国英格兰諾福爾可諾維其。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Morley
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from any of various places called Morley (for example in Derbyshire, County Durham, Norfolk, and Yorkshire), or Moreleigh in Devon, all of which are named from Old English mōr ‘moor’ + lēah ‘woodland clearing’.
Irish (Mayo): Anglicized form of Gaelic Ó Murghaile ‘descendant of Murghal’, a personal name based on muir ‘sea’ + gal ‘valour’.
Irish (Mayo): Anglicized form of Gaelic Ó Murthuile ‘descendant of Murthuile’, a personal name derived from muir ‘sea’ + tuile ‘tide’.

variants.name: Marler
meanings: occupational name from Middle English marler, either ‘spreader of marl (as fertilizer)’ or ‘hewer or quarrier of marl’.
topographic name from Middle English marlere ‘marl-pit’ (Old French marliere).
in Norfolk, perhaps also a variant of   Morley  .

variants.name: Murley
meanings: Irish (Cork and Kerry): variant of   Morley  .

English (Cornwall and Somerset): habitational name from Murley in Uplowman (Devon). The placename derives from Old English mōr ‘moor’ + lēah ‘woodland clearing’. There may well have been some confusion with Morley .

nameMeanings.name: William
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Probably the most successful of all the Old French names of Germanic origin that were introduced to England by the Normans. It is derived from Germanic wil ‘will, desire’ + helm ‘helmet, protection’. The fact that it was borne by the Conqueror himself does not seem to have inhibited its favour with the ‘conquered’ population: in the first century after the Conquest it was the commonest male name of all, and not only among the Normans. In the later Middle Ages it was overtaken by John , but continued to run second to that name until the 20th century, when the picture became more fragmented.

historicEvents.title: First War of Scottish Independence
historicEvents.description: The First War of Scottish Independence began after England invaded Scotland in 1296. The Treaty of Edinburgh was signed in 1328 which declared peace between the two kingdoms and brought the war to an end.

historicEvents.title: The Hundred Years' War
historicEvents.description: The Hundred Years' War between France and England was largely due to the question of legitimate succession to the French crown.

en.lifeSummary: When William de Morley 3rd Baron Morley was born on 24 June 1319, in Hockering, Norfolk, England, his father, Robert DeMorley, was 26 and his mother, Hawise Marshall, was 19. He married Cecily Bardolf on 6 March 1344, in Wormegay, Norfolk, England. They were the parents of at least 5 sons and 1 daughter. He died on 30 April 1379, in Essex, England, at the age of 59, and was buried in Norwich, Norfolk, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque William de Morley 3rd Baron Morley est né le 24 juin 1319, à Hockering, Norfolk, Angleterre, son père, Robert DeMorley, avait 26 ans et sa mère, Hawise Marshall, avait 19 ans. Il a épousé Cecily Bardolf le 6 mars 1344, à Wormegay, Norfolk, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 5 fils et 1 fille. Il est décédé le 30 avril 1379, à Essex, Angleterre, à l’âge de 59 ans, et a été enterré à Norwich, Norfolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als William de Morley 3rd Baron Morley am 24. Juni 1319 in Hockering, Norfolk, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Robert DeMorley 26 und seine Mutter Hawise Marshall 19. Er hat am 6. März 1344 in Wormegay, Norfolk, England Cecily Bardolf geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 5 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Er starb am 30. April 1379 im Alter von 59 Jahren in Essex, England und wurde in Norwich, Norfolk, England, United Kingdom begraben.

Lui sposato Cecily Bardolf il 6 marzo 1344, nel Wormegay, Norfolk, England. Erano genitori di almeno 5 figli e 1 figlia. Morì il 30 aprile 1379, nel Essex, England, all'età di 59 anni, e fu sepolto a Norwich, Norfolk, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: William de Morley 3rd Baron Morleyが1319年6月24日にイギリスノーフォルクホーッカーイングで生まれた時，父Robert DeMorleyは26歳，母Hawise Marshallは19歳であった。1344年3月6日にイギリスノーフォルクウオルメガイでCecily Bardolfと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも5人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼は1379年4月30日にイギリスエセックスで59歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスノーフォルクノーウィチにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: William de Morley 3rd Baron Morley(이)가 1319년 6월 24일 영국 노르폴크 호커잉에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Robert DeMorley(은)는 26세였고, 그의 어머니 Hawise Marshall(은)는 19세였다. 그는 1344년 3월 6일 영국 노르폴크 워메가이에서 Cecily Bardolf(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1379년 4월 30일 영국 에세스에서 59세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 노르폴크 노위치에 묻혔다.

Ele casou-se com Cecily Bardolf em 6 de março de 1344, em Wormegay, Norfolk, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 5 filhos e 1 filha. ru.Morley, Norfolk, England: морли ст питир, норфолк, Англия, Великобритания
ru.lifeSummary: Когда William de Morley 3rd Baron Morley родился 24 июня 1319 г. в местности хоккиринг, норфолк, Англия, его отцу по имени Robert DeMorley было 26 лет, а матери, которую звали Hawise Marshall, 19. Он женился на женщине по имени Cecily Bardolf 6 марта 1344 г. в местности вормегеи, норфолк, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 1 дочь. Он умер 30 апреля 1379 г. в местности эссекс, Англия в возрасте 59 лет и был похоронен в местности норвич, норфолк, Англия, Великобритания.

Se casó con Cecily Bardolf el 6 de marzo de 1344, en Wormegay, Norfolk, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 5 hijos y 1 hija. Murió el 30 de abril de 1379, en Essex, Inglaterra, a la edad de 59 años, y fue sepultado en Norwich, Norfolk, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
